corp_name_en: 北京红松创业咨询管理有限公司
hero_title: Every Great Project Finds Its Right Partner
hero_slogan: VentureAI is an AI-powered startup & investment ecosystem platform. Founder-centric by design, we precisely connect entrepreneurs with investors, industry experts, corporates and government resources — redefining the infrastructure of China's venture ecosystem.
hero_slogan_en: AI驱动 · 创业者为核心 · 全球华人创投生态
about_us_title_en: 重新定义创投生态的基础设施
about_us_content_1: Beijing Hongsong Venture Consulting Management Co., Ltd, operating under the YOLUYORU Capital brand, is an AI-driven venture services firm dedicated to building VentureAI — the all-in-one ecosystem platform for global Chinese-speaking entrepreneurs.
about_us_content_2: We believe every talented founder deserves access to the right capital, resources and partners. Information asymmetry and resource mismatch are persistent pain points in China's venture ecosystem — and AI technology is the most powerful tool to solve them.
about_us_content_3: Headquartered in Singapore, we serve the global Chinese-speaking venture community across Southeast Asia, Hong Kong, North America, and mainland China — building truly cross-border venture ecosystem infrastructure.
value_title_1_desc: From a database of 500+ investors, our 4-dimensional matching engine (sector, stage, region, portfolio) generates a custom BP and delivers it directly to your best-fit investors — 10x more efficient than cold outreach.
value_title_2_desc: AI aggregates VC & startup news from 800+ sources daily, extracts key insights, and delivers personalized briefings. Policy changes, funding events, competitor moves — we filter the signal from the noise.
value_title_3_slogan: 创业搭子与合伙人匹配
value_title_3_desc: AI-powered matching based on skill complement, industry background and startup stage — connecting you with the right co-founders, domain experts and technical partners
value_title_4_desc: Identify enterprise procurement windows and key decision-makers. AI generates personalized outreach messages to help founders land their first major enterprise customers.
value_title_5_subtitle: Token 经济与合伙人制度
value_title_5_desc: Earn tokens by contributing to the platform. Accumulate and redeem for value. High contributors join equity reform and become platform shareholders — with a future SPAC listing pathway to share in platform growth.
value_title_6_desc: Spanning Mainland China, Hong Kong, Southeast Asia and Silicon Valley — a bilingual platform serving the global Chinese-speaking venture community wherever they are.
team_avatar_1_bg: Top university alumni with full-cycle startup experience and deep understanding of venture ecosystem pain points.
team_avatar_2_bg: Seasoned primary market professional with extensive deal evaluation and investment decision-making experience.
team_avatar_3_bg: Researchers from top universities with extensive experience in technology transfer and startup incubation.
team_avatar_4_bg: Extensive media network and content operations expertise, leading platform content ecosystem and brand communication.
team_avatar_5_bg: Specializing in venture law — equity structure design, fundraising compliance and cross-border legal support ensuring compliant operations in Singapore and international markets.
team_avatar_6_bg: The team covers 8 capability dimensions: serial entrepreneurship, investment, tech transfer, media, AI tech, academic resources, industry network, and legal compliance.
download_app_subtitle: 随时随地，连接创投生态
download_app_body: VentureAI App brings the entire venture ecosystem to your fingertips. Investor matching, industry news, project connections — one app for everything.
download_app_features_1: Get 1,000 Tokens as a welcome gift on registration
download_app_features_2: AI smart matching — find your best-fit investors in 3 minutes
download_app_features_3: Personalized VC daily briefing delivered at 08:00 every day
download_app_features_5: Singapore servers, fully compliant and secure
contact_us_body: Whether you're a founder raising capital, an investor seeking deal flow, or a potential partner — we'd love to connect. Our team is based in Beijing and Singapore, ready to support you.
